title: fragaria collina var. cerinoalba
intro: Fragaria collina var. cerinoalba is a variety of wild strawberry, a type of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Fragaria collina var. cerinoalba are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. It can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be consumed orally or applied topically for its various health benefits.
